head: 9d7d763
prerequisite_note: Enterprise-Grade final_score is 3.8 (preliminary 7.6), below the 8.5 prerequisite. E.1 (SOC 2 Type I) and E.2 (pen-test) are pending external engagement.

external_dependencies.blocker: SOC 2 Type I not yet complete (E.1 pending). Type II observation period cannot begin until Type I is clean.
No cardholder data (CHD) in codebase. No PCI DSS engagement required unless card product introduced.
Red team scope defined (GTCX-RT-001) but exercise not yet executed. Target window: 2026-H2.
No SARB engagement doc, no FSCA license application started, no regulatory correspondence on file.
DR runbook and structural validation exist, but live RDS restore test pending operator credentials. No external witness signed.
Pen-test scope and vendor shortlist complete, but no SOW signed and no historical pen-test reports exist.

controls.name: SOC 2 Type II
controls.justification: Prerequisite E.1 (SOC 2 Type I) is pending per enterprise-grade evidence. No Type II observation period document exists. Only 2 evidence/ticket files found in 01-docs/10-compliance/. Type I incomplete triggers 0.0 multiplier per rubric.
raw_evidence: enterprise-grade-evidence.json: E.1 status = 'pending' — SOC 2 Type I auditor not engaged; readiness checklist ~92%
cat 01-docs/10-compliance/soc2-type2-observation.md: File does not exist
find 01-docs/10-compliance/ -name '*evidence*' -o -name '*ticket*' | wc -l: 2

controls.name: PCI DSS Level 1
controls.justification: No raw cardholder data found in codebase. grep matches are false positives: 'PANX' = Peer Attestation Network, 'card' = low-cardinality metrics label, 'zcard' = Redis command. No tokenization strategy needed because no CHD is handled. Full points awarded as N/A.
raw_evidence: grep -ri 'card|pan|cvv|pci' 03-platform/tools/*/03-platform/src/ 01-docs/architecture/: no CHD matches; only 'PANX' (Peer Attestation Network), 'low-cardinality', 'zcard' (Redis)
find 01-docs/10-compliance/ -name '*pci*' -o -name '*qsa*': 0 files
cat 01-docs/architecture/payment-tokenization.md: No tokenization strategy — not required without CHD

controls.name: Red team exercise (annual)
controls.justification: Red team scope is comprehensively defined (GTCX-RT-001) with assumed-breach narrative, success criteria, and vendor selection. However, the exercise has not been executed (target window 2026-H2). No report showing lateral movement containment exists. Score = 0.5 per rubric (scope defined, no report).
raw_evidence: 01-docs/05-audit/red-team-scope.md: Document ID GTCX-RT-001 v1.0; assumed-breach narrative; scope covers Identity, Network, Compute, Data, CI/CD, Social; target execution 2026-H2
find 01-docs/05-audit/ -name '*red*team*': 1 file (scope doc only)
grep -ri 'assume.breach|lateral.movement|pivot' 01-docs/05-audit/ 01-docs/09-security/: 9 matches across scope, pen-test scope, audit framework, and containment narrative template; no exercise report

controls.name: Dedicated CISO or vCISO
controls.justification: CISO role is thoroughly defined (GTCX-CISO-001), Board Security Committee charter ratified, and monthly/quarterly reporting cadence specified. However, no named CISO or vCISO is currently appointed (status: Open — recruitment in progress, target 2026-06-30). Monthly board reporting is documented but not yet operational.
raw_evidence: 01-docs/governance/ciso-role.md: Authority matrix, strategic/operational/compliance responsibilities, monthly security posture report to Board Security Committee specified
01-docs/governance/ciso-appointment.md: Status = 'Open — recruitment in progress'; target appointment 2026-06-30; job spec in progress
01-docs/10-compliance/board-security-committee-charter.md: CISO is standing member; quarterly meetings defined
01-docs/governance/board-charter.md: Board retains authority over executive appointments including CISO

controls.name: Regulatory relationship (SARB, FSCA)
controls.justification: No SARB engagement documentation exists. No FSCA license application has been started. FICA compliance framework notes FSCA Category I/II license application status as 'Not started' with target 2026-Q3. No regulatory correspondence files found.
raw_evidence: cat 01-docs/10-compliance/sarb-engagement.md: File does not exist
grep -ri 'fsca|category.*I|category.*II|license' 01-docs/10-compliance/: no FSCA license docs; only generic 'license' references in open-source/policy contexts
find 01-docs/10-compliance/ -name '*sarb*' -o -name '*fsca*': 0 files
01-docs/10-compliance/fica-compliance.md: 'FSCA Category I/II license application — Not started — Target 2026-Q3'

controls.name: Fraud detection + AML monitoring
controls.justification: AML monitoring policy (GTCX-AML-001) and FICA compliance framework (GTCX-FICA-001) are comprehensive. Five automated transaction monitoring rules (AML-001 to AML-005) are implemented in the anomaly detector. Sanctions screening covers UN, OFAC, EU, UK, and SA lists. STR/SAR filing process is defined with 48-hour SLA via goAML/FIU/NFIU portals. Minor gap: Compliance Officer not yet appointed.
raw_evidence: 01-docs/10-compliance/aml-monitoring-policy.md: Risk-based approach with Low/Medium/High tiers; 5 automated rules; sanctions screening (UN, OFAC, EU, UK, SA); STR/SAR process with 48h SLA; 5-year record retention in WORM S3
01-docs/10-compliance/fica-compliance.md: CDD workflow, ongoing due diligence, record keeping, RMCP, internal controls mapped to FICA 21/22/29/42A
03-platform/tools/anomaly-detector/: AML rules referenced in policy (structural evidence of implementation)

controls.name: Segregation of duties (SoD)
controls.justification: Separation of Duties Matrix is documented and detailed (GTCX roles vs critical functions with P/A/R/-- annotations). Conflict-of-interest controls prohibit dangerous role combinations. Approval workflows exist in code (compliance-gateway approval tickets, parseApprovalContext, buildAccessProfile). Trust account SoD table shows no single role can both initiate and approve disbursements. Terraform IAM uses scoped IRSA policies. Minor gap: ALB policy still contains a wildcard Describe* (known from E-GAP).
raw_evidence: 01-docs/10-compliance/separation-of-duties-matrix.md: 6 roles x 10 critical functions; audit database write prohibited for all humans; no single person may deploy and approve same change; KMS signing requires CISO approval
03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway/03-platform/src/: approval ticket parsing, access profile building, policy enforcement for mutating tools
01-docs/financial/trust-account.md: SoD table — Treasury Analyst initiates, Treasury Manager approves, CFO approves >$100K, Bank Relationship Manager executes external transfers only
04-ship/terraform/modules/irsa-platform/main.tf: scoped KMS Sign policy tied to specific key ARN

controls.name: BCP tested annually with evidence
controls.justification: Disaster Recovery runbook exists with RTO 4h / RPO 15min and per-component recovery methods. DR tests are scheduled (CI gate per PR, weekly testnet schedule, on-demand). Two incident-response drills completed (DRILL-001, DRILL-002). However, the live RDS restore DR test is pending operator credentials. No external witness documentation exists. RTO has not been demonstrated in a live environment. Score = 0.5 per rubric (test executed structurally, not witnessed).
raw_evidence: 01-docs/04-ops/runbooks/disaster-recovery.md: RTO 4h, RPO 15min; per-component targets; CI gate + weekly + on-demand schedules; 2026-05-11 CI gate PASS
01-docs/05-audit/dr-fire-drill-evidence-2026-05-31.md: Structural validation PASS; live RDS restore pending operator credentials
01-docs/04-ops/drills/drill-001-unauthorized-kms-sign-2026-05-12.md: Completed on-call drill (23 min, contained)
01-docs/04-ops/drills/drill-002-replay-guard-failure-2026-05-17.md: Completed replay-guard drill
find 01-docs/05-audit/ -name '*witness*' -o -name '*independent*': 0 files
grep -ri 'rto.achieved|recovery.time.demonstrated' 01-docs/05-audit/: only template fields and prompt references; no demonstrated evidence

controls.name: Customer fund segregation
controls.justification: Trust Account Framework (GTCX-TRUST-001) is comprehensive: multi-currency account architecture, daily reconciliation process with 6 steps, SoD for financial roles, disbursement policies with tiered approvals, prohibited uses defined, CPA audit trail (monthly internal, quarterly external, annual financial), and breach response procedures. However, no actual trust accounts have been opened — all target banks show 'RFP pending' and status is 'Framework defined; accounts pending bank partnership'.
raw_evidence: 01-docs/financial/trust-account.md: ZAR/USD/XAU sub-account architecture; daily reconciliation with API log, SQL export, exception report, CFO sign-off, WORM archive; SoD table; CPA audit calendar; breach response protocol
01-docs/financial/trust-account.md: 'South Africa — FAIS client money in trust — Framework defined; accounts pending bank partnership'
01-docs/financial/trust-account.md: All banking partners show Status = 'RFP pending'
find 01-docs/financial/ -name '*trust*' -o -name '*reconciliation*': 1 file (trust-account.md)

controls.name: Pen-test every 6 months
controls.justification: Pen-test scope (01-docs/05-audit/pen-test-scope-2026.md) and vendor shortlist are complete, but no SOW has been signed and no historical penetration test reports exist. Zero pen-test report files found. The 7 remediation files are 10-10 roadmap remediation plans, not pen-test findings. No pen-tests have been executed in the last 12 months.
raw_evidence: 01-docs/05-audit/pen-test-scope-2026.md: Scope defined, vendor shortlist complete (SensePost recommended), target completion 2026-06-30, status: awaiting leadership selection & RFP send
01-docs/05-audit/pen-test-intake-evidence-2026-05-31.md: SOW intake pack ready; human signature pending
find 01-docs/05-audit/ -name '*pen*test*report*': 0 files
find 01-docs/05-audit/ -name '*remediation*': 7 files (all 10-10 roadmap plans, not pen-test remediation)

recommendations: CRITICAL: Complete SOC 2 Type I engagement immediately. Bank-Grade B.1 is blocked until Type I is clean and a 12-month Type II observation period begins.
CRITICAL: Appoint a named CISO or vCISO by 2026-06-30 to satisfy B.4. All role documentation is ready; only the appointment is missing.
HIGH: Begin FSCA Category I/II license application and SARB notification in 2026-Q3 per existing plan. B.5 is a hard blocker for operating as a financial services provider in South Africa.
HIGH: Sign pen-test SOW and execute first accredited penetration test by 2026-Q3. This unblocks B.10 and feeds into B.3 red team timing.
MEDIUM: Execute live RDS restore DR test with operator credentials and engage an external witness to sign off. Required for B.8 full points.
MEDIUM: Open trust accounts with banking partners and begin daily reconciliation automation. Framework is complete; execution depends on bank partnerships (target 2026-Q4).
LOW: Continue red team planning and execute in 2026-H2 after pen-test completion, as scoped in GTCX-RT-001.
LOW: Address known IAM wildcard (elasticloadbalancing:Describe* in ALB policy) from E-GAP to strengthen B.7 evidence.
